info.name: TradeKaro API
info.description:
Complete API reference for the TradeKaro trading platform.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Create an Environment with these variables:
   - `baseUrl`      → `https://abhitrade.com`  (or `http://localhost:3000` for local dev)
   - `accessToken`  → filled automatically by the Login request
   - `watchlistId`  → fill after creating a watchlist
   - `orderId`      → fill after placing an order
   - `alertId`      → fill after creating an alert
3. Run **Auth / Login** first — it auto-sets `accessToken` via a test script.
4. All protected endpoints send `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

## Authentication flow
- Login → get `accessToken` (short-lived, 15 min) + `at_sid` cookie.
- Use `POST /api/auth/refresh` to get a new accessToken when it expires.
- The `at_sid` cookie is sent automatically by Postman (enable "Automatically follow redirects" and "Send cookies").

## Live data (SSE)
- `/api/market-stream` is a Server-Sent Events endpoint — use EventSource in Flutter, not a regular REST call.
  See the SSE section for Flutter code examples.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Registration, login, token refresh, profile, logout.

request.description: Step 1 of OTP registration. Validates name, email, phone. Sends OTP to phone via SMS. Returns `{ message, phone }`. Follow with **Verify OTP**.
Re-send OTP to an existing phone number.
Step 2 of OTP flow. Returns `accessToken` + sets `at_sid` cookie.

Login with email and password. The test script auto-saves `accessToken` to the collection variable.

Returns:
- `accessToken` (JWT, 15 min)
- `user` object
- Sets `at_sid` httpOnly cookie (refresh token, 30 days)
Uses the `at_sid` httpOnly cookie (sent automatically by Postman). Returns a new `accessToken`. Call this when you get a 401 on any protected endpoint.
Returns the authenticated user profile. Requires valid `accessToken`.
Invalidates the session. Clears `at_sid` cookie.

item.name: 📈 Market Data
item.description: Quotes, live stream, index prices, gainers/losers, market movers.

query.description: Search term — symbol, name, or partial match (min 1 char)
EQ | FUT | CE | PE | IDX | all

request.description:
Search for any instrument — equities, futures, options, indices.

**Flow:**
1. Redis metadata cache (5 min TTL)
2. PostgreSQL `security_master` full-text search
3. For every result, pipeline-fetches live Redis LTP to overlay current price

**Price sources:**
- `priceSource: "live"` → AngelOne WS tick (market hours)
- `priceSource: "eod"` → Last bhavcopy upload
- No price → security master not yet uploaded

Single instrument quote with full OHLCV.

**Priority chain:**
1. `at:market:quote:{exchange}:{symbol}` — Redis live (AngelOne WS, TTL 1h)
2. `at:market:eod:{exchange}:{symbol}` — Redis EOD (bhavcopy, no TTL)
3. `market_quotes` table — DB live sync
4. `security_master` table — DB EOD bhavcopy prices

Returns `source: 'live' | 'eod' | 'db-live' | 'db-eod' | 'unavailable'`

query.description: Comma-separated list in format EXCHANGE:SYMBOL. Use NSE: or BSE: prefix. If no prefix, defaults to NSE.

request.description:
Returns NIFTY 50, NIFTY BANK, SENSEX, FINNIFTY, MIDCPNIFTY live/EOD prices from Redis.
Updated every 60 s by the background market-sync job.
Top gainers/losers/volume shockers from Groww, updated every 60 s during market hours. Auto-triggers background refresh if data is stale.
Returns top gainers and top losers together in one call. Useful for dashboard summary card.

Bulk real-time quote from AngelOne REST API. Requires active AngelOne session.

`mode`: `LTP` (just last price) | `OHLC` | `FULL` (default, includes OI, bid/ask, circuit limits)

Tokens are AngelOne instrument tokens — get them from `/api/search` or `/api/scrips`.

item.name: 📊 Option Chain
item.description: Option chain, expiry dates, live OI/IV streaming.

query.description: NIFTY | BANKNIFTY | FINNIFTY | MIDCPNIFTY | RELIANCE | any F&O stock (required)

request.description:
Full option chain for an underlying and expiry date.

**Response includes per strike:**
- CE and PE: LTP, bid, ask, IV, OI, change in OI, volume, delta, gamma, theta, vega
- PCR (Put-Call Ratio), ATM strike, underlying LTP
- Cached in Redis for 5 s

**Requires:** Security master uploaded + bhavcopy or live WS prices.
Returns sorted list of all available expiry dates for the given underlying. Pull this first to populate the expiry dropdown.
SSE stream for live option chain updates. Same as market-stream but optimized for option chains — streams CE/PE LTP and OI changes every 2 s.

item.name: 📋 Instruments
item.description: Security master lookup, scrips, instrument detail.

request.description:
Look up full instrument metadata by AngelOne token.
Checks Redis first, falls back to PostgreSQL security_master.

Returns instrument list from Redis security master index.
Useful for pre-loading scrip data in the Flutter app startup.

Fetch OHLCV candle data from AngelOne for any timeframe.

`timeframe` options: `1m`, `3m`, `5m`, `15m`, `30m`, `1h`, `1D`, `1W`, `1M`

Returns array of `[timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume]` tuples.

query.description: NSE symbol or index name (NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, SENSEX)

request.description: Proxy to Yahoo Finance chart data. Works for equities and indices (auto-maps NIFTY→^NSEI, SENSEX→^BSESN, BANKNIFTY→^NSEBANK etc.). No auth required. Useful fallback when AngelOne candles are unavailable.

item.name: 👁 Watchlists
item.description: Create, manage, and populate multiple watchlists. All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Returns all watchlists owned by the authenticated user.
Create a new watchlist. Auto-saves ID to `watchlistId` variable.
Returns all instruments in the watchlist.
Add a stock/instrument to the watchlist. Returns 409 if already present.
Remove a specific item by its UUID (from the items list).

item.name: 📦 Orders
item.description: Place, view, modify, and cancel orders.

query.description: pending | completed | cancelled | rejected | all (default: all)

request.description: List all orders for the authenticated user.

Place a new order.

**Required fields:** `exchange`, `symbol`, `transaction_type`, `order_type`, `product_type`, `quantity`

**transaction_type:** `BUY` | `SELL`
**order_type:** `MARKET` | `LIMIT` | `SL` | `SL-M` | `BO` | `CO`
**product_type:** `CNC` (delivery) | `MIS` (intraday) | `NRML` (F&O)
**validity:** `DAY` | `IOC` | `GTC`
**is_paper:** `true` for paper trading, `false` for real (default false)
Modify price or quantity of a pending order.
Cancel a pending order. Sets status to `cancelled`.

query.description: Filter by date YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to today)

request.description: Returns open positions for the user. Includes buy/sell average, P&L, MTM.
Returns delivery holdings (CNC positions). Includes average price, current value, unrealised P&L.

item.name: 🔔 Alerts
item.description: Price alerts — create, list, update, delete.

request.description:
Create a price alert.

**Required:** `exchange`, `symbol`, `condition`, `target_value`
**condition:** `above` | `below` | `crosses`
**note:** optional free-text note

item.name: 🤝 AngelOne Direct
item.description: Direct AngelOne broker integration — portfolio, positions, profile, margin, orderbook. These call AngelOne API on your behalf.

request.description: Triggers AngelOne login using server-side credentials (`ANGELONE_CLIENT_ID`, `ANGELONE_PASSWORD`, `ANGELONE_TOTP_SECRET` from `.env.local`). Caches `accessToken` + `feedToken` in Redis session. No body needed — credentials are server-side only.
Returns AngelOne broker profile (name, PAN, email, segments, exchanges).
Returns delivery holdings from AngelOne broker account.
Returns today's open positions from AngelOne broker.
Returns available margin, used margin, and net balance from AngelOne.
Returns today's orders from AngelOne broker.
Get LTP for a single instrument directly from AngelOne.

Batch quotes directly from AngelOne Smart API.
`mode`: `LTP` | `OHLC` | `FULL`
Search instruments using AngelOne Smart API search.
Place an order directly via AngelOne Smart API. Requires `apiKey` and `accessToken` from AngelOne (not TradeKaro auth).

item.name: ⚙️ Admin / Data Management
item.description: Bhavcopy upload, security master, Redis management. Mostly for admin/internal use.

request.description: Returns service health: PostgreSQL and Redis connectivity, AngelOne WS status.

formdata.description: NSE/BSE CM or FO bhavcopy CSV (multi-file supported)

request.description:
Upload EOD bhavcopy CSV files (multipart).

**Supported formats:**
- `BhavCopy_NSE_CM_0_0_0_YYYYMMDD_F_0000.csv` (NSE equities)
- `BhavCopy_NSE_FO_0_0_0_YYYYMMDD_F_0000.csv` (NSE F&O)
- `BhavCopy_BSE_CM_0_0_0_YYYYMMDD_F_0000.csv` (BSE equities)
- `BhavCopy_BSE_FO_0_0_0_YYYYMMDD_F_0000.csv` (BSE F&O)
- Old NSE EQ format (`cm*.csv`)

After loading into Postgres, prices are automatically synced to Redis (`at:market:eod:*` keys, no TTL).
Returns status of the last bhavcopy load from Redis.
Triggers reload of all CSV files already in the server's `Bhavcopy/` directory without re-uploading.
Triggers auto-download of today's NSE CM bhavcopy from NSE archives. Normally runs automatically at 3:45 PM IST Mon–Fri. Use this for manual trigger or catch-up.

Upload NSE/BSE index bhavcopy files.

**NSE format:** `ind_close_all_DDMMYYYY.csv`
- Columns: `Index Name, Index Date, Open Index Value, High Index Value, Low Index Value, Closing Index Value, Points Change, Change(%), Volume, P/E, P/B, Div Yield`

**BSE format:** `INDEXSummary_DDMMYYYY.csv`
- Columns: `IndexCode, IndexID, IndexName, PreviousClose, OpenPrice, HighPrice, LowPrice, ClosePrice, 52weeksHigh, 52weeksLow`

After Postgres upsert, index prices are synced to Redis (`at:market:eod:*` keys).

formdata.description: AngelOne or NSE security master CSV/JSON/ZIP

request.description: Upload the instrument/security master file. This populates `security_master` table and Redis search index. Download the file from AngelOne: https://margincalculator.angelbroking.com/OpenAPI_File/files/OpenAPIScripMaster.json
Poll the status of a security master upload job by job UUID.
Triggers an immediate AngelOne market data sync (index quotes + all watched symbols). Normally runs automatically every 4 h.
Returns last sync metadata — when it ran, what was updated.
Returns AngelOne feedToken and clientCode needed to connect the browser-side WebSocket (for option chain real-time). These are short-lived tokens cached in Redis.
Returns Redis key counts, memory usage, and key distribution.
Returns the raw value of a Redis key. Useful for debugging live prices.
